title: Divoom Timebox Evo Pixel Art Bluetooth Speaker with App Control, Creative LED Speaker & Alarm Clock, DIY Pixel Display, Perfect Thanksgiving & Xmas Present for Teens, Great for Christmas Decor
features: Meet Divoom TimeBox Evo - This retro Bluetooth speaker is a portable, miniaturized entertainment center! It features a 6W DSP speaker with 16x16 pixel, 256 full RGB self-programmable LED screen, has various other features like an alarm clock, score keeper, stopwatch, planner/calendar, and the display is able to show some very nice pixel art.

Perfect Christmas & Xmas Gifts – Looking for unique Christmas gifts that stand out? The Divoom Timebox Evo is a creative tech gadget with pixel art display, custom animations, and rich sound—making it one of the most fun Xmas gifts for teens, music lovers, and friends. A thoughtful Christmas gift idea that brings smiles to every celebration.

Hi-Res Audio – Press play and enjoy powerful stereo sound that stays clear and distortion-free, even at high volumes. It can be used as a speaker for portable music production, and it’s also great for online yoga classes on Zoom to hear your instructor more clearly.

Real-time Pixel Art Drawing - This is pixel art display that can be customized to whatever pixel art you like on the screen. The bright led display allows you to get creative and create your own art by using your finger tips which are displaying on the device in real-time.

Great desk accessory - A cute retro alarm clock to play music and podcasts and you can make an animation to go with your nightly alarm telling you to take your meds. Also the notifications and daily planner options are really useful for you to stay focused without missing anything important.
